title: Delicious Chicken Tacos
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make recipe for chicken tacos, perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar or Monterey Jack work well

ingredients.name: cumin
ingredients.notes: ground cumin adds a nice depth of flavor

instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Season the chicken breast with cumin, chili powder, salt, and pepper.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of chicken onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of garlicky salsa, some shredded cheese, and any desired toppings (such as diced onion or bell pepper).
Optional: top with diced avocado, sour cream, or cilantro for added flavor and texture.
